tasks.label: Make Demo Data
tasks.command: conda run -n s3-360 python scripts/make_demo_data.py --out data/demo/demo_video.npz

tasks.label: Make SHD360 Sample
tasks.command: conda run -n s3-360 python scripts/make_shd360_sample.py --out data/shd360_sample/shd360_tiny.npz

tasks.label: Convert Real 360 Video
tasks.command: conda run -n s3-360 python scripts/make_real360_sample.py --video-path data/raw/videos/example_360.mp4 --out data/real360_sample/example_360.npz

tasks.label: Run Experiment
tasks.command: conda run -n s3-360 python scripts/run_experiment.py --input data/shd360_sample/shd360_tiny.npz --budget-ratio 0.22 --video

tasks.label: Run Streamlit App
tasks.command: conda run -n s3-360 streamlit run app.py --server.port 8501 --server.address 127.0.0.1
